title: stachys leucoglossa subsp. samothracica
intro: Stachys leucoglossa subsp. samothracica, also known as Greek betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Greek betony has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving headaches and migraines, and promoting relaxation and improved sleep quality. Greek betony can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the tea being one of the most popular and accessible preparations.
